title: ReCreated - Create Aeronautics Update
description: ReCreated is a NeoForge based Create Modpack. It focuses on stability, Create Aeronautics and fun while keeping performance. This Modpack is for used for the project of the same name from the Minecraft Network SurvivalProductions.
body:
![ReCreated Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed09ccdde4d5190c5022c44e88bab5e167638c94.png)

# ReCreated Modpack

ReCreated is a **NeoForge**-based modpack which is built around the **Create Mod**. It focuses on **stability** and **fun** while keeping **performance** in mind.
This modpack is used for the project of the same name from the Minecraft network **SurvivalProductions**.

## What does ReCreated offer?
- **Highlight:** Build your own Airships, Cars and Planes with 'Create Aeronautics'
- Build your own factories with the Create Mod
- Conquer the world with trains
- Create beautiful buildings with lots of decorative blocks
- Explore a custom End Dimension, bringing endless exploration fun

## ReCreated by SurvivalProductions 

This modpack is made for the **German**-based SurvivalProductions network.
**Feel free to join us!** You can find all relevant information on our [Discord Server](https://survivalproductions.eu/discord). Whether you’re new to Create or an expert: **Everyone is welcome!**

## Questions?
We are here for you. Just open a ticket on our [Discord Server](https://survivalproductions.eu/discord) or check the **FAQ** below.

<details>
<summary>FAQ</summary>

- What version is ReCreated?
  - We use the **Fabric Loader** and **Minecraft 1.20.1**.

- How much RAM do I need?
  - We recommend using at least **8 GB** of RAM.

- What is the server IP?
  - You can join with the IP "**recreated.survivalproductions.eu**".

</details>
